body.stem: During the current fiscal year, the Palm Springs government recorded a $14,900 transfer from the General Fund to an internal service fund, a $24,900 transfer from the General Fund to an enterprise fund, a $4,800 transfer from an enterprise fund to an internal service fund, and a $10,000 transfer from an enterprise fund to the General Fund.
